textos.texto: Hi Paul! Last month I went to Canada. I took the plane from Lima and I arrived in Toronto. I stayed at a hotel for five days. I visited museums and I ate a lot of good food, but I had a headache the first day! I met new people and I practised my English every day. Next year, I'm going to study French too, because I want to live in Canada. See you soon, Joel.

preguntas.enunciado: Joel tuvo dolor de estómago el primer día.
¿Qué va a estudiar el próximo año?

textos.titulo: Mi tiempo libre y mis planes
textos.texto: Hi! In my free time I like sports. I play football with my friends on Saturday and I go swimming on Sunday. I also love music and I play the guitar. I am a student at the university and I study computer science. Next year I am going to travel to Canada. I am going to study French because I want to live there. What do you like to do?
